creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
As far as I can see, devel/arm-none-eabi-gcc and devel/armv6-freebsd10.0-xdev don't compile with clang 3.5.1 either.  So these are not regressions.

Also, the failure is when xgcc is compiling a .S file, so clang is not actually involved in this error.  It is something broken in either the .S file, or gcc 4.9.1.
